CustomField.formula: IF(Brand__c = 'Blue Arrow',IMAGE("/resource/BASmall", ""), IF(Brand__c = 'SRG',IMAGE("/resource/SRGLogo",""), IF(Brand__c = 'Impellam',IMAGE("/resource/ImpellamLogo",""), IF(Brand__c = 'MGG',IMAGE("/resource/MedacsLogo",""), IF(Brand__c = 'Tate',IMAGE("/resource/TateLogo",""), IF(Brand__c = 'Carbon60',IMAGE("/resource/C60",""), IF(Brand__c = 'Lorien',IMAGE("/resource/LorienLogo",""), IF(Brand__c = 'Guidant',IMAGE("/resource/GuidantLogo",""), ""))))))))
CustomField.label: Brand Logo
